items.name: surfaces
items.title: Surfaces
items.description: Eight-level surface and shadow ladder for elevation. Light: two color steps then flat white, differentiated by shadow. Dark: additive white-opacity ladder with layered inset highlights and drops.

light.shadow-6: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color)
light.shadow-7: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color)
light.shadow-8: 0 0 0 1px var(--shadow-color), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--shadow-color), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--shadow-color), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--shadow-color), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--shadow-color), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--shadow-color), 0 96px 96px -48px var(--shadow-color)

dark.shadow-3: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-mid), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-base), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.12), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-4: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-mid), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-mid), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.14), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-5: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-high), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-mid), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.16), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-6: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-high), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.18), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-7: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-peak), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.20), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--dm-drop)
dark.shadow-8: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--dm-hi-peak), inset 0 0 0 1px var(--dm-ring-high), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0,0,0,0.22), 0 1px 1px -0.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 3px 3px -1.5px var(--dm-drop), 0 6px 6px -3px var(--dm-drop), 0 12px 12px -6px var(--dm-drop), 0 24px 24px -12px var(--dm-drop), 0 48px 48px -24px var(--dm-drop), 0 96px 96px -48px var(--dm-drop)

items.name: utils
items.title: Utilities
items.description: Utility function for merging Tailwind CSS classes with clsx and tailwind-merge.

items.name: springs
items.title: Spring Animations
items.description: Spring animation token presets for Framer Motion (fast, moderate, slow).

items.name: font-weight
items.title: Font Weight Tokens
items.description: Variable font weight tokens for Inter (normal, medium, semibold, bold) using font-variation-settings.

items.name: surface-context
items.title: Surface Context
items.description: React context that tracks the current substrate elevation level. Elevated components (Dropdown, Select, etc.) read it via useSurface() and render at substrate + offset, then re-provide a new substrate so further nesting elevates further.

items.name: surface-classes
items.title: Surface Class Lookup
items.description: Static lookup tables for bg-surface-N and shadow-surface-N utilities. Required because Tailwind v4 cannot detect template-literal class names.

items.name: elevated
items.title: Elevated
items.description: Elevation primitive. Wraps the read-substrate / compute-level / apply-classes / re-provide-context pattern into one component. Pulls in the surface theme tokens, substrate context, and class lookup so a single install drops in the whole elevation system.

items.name: shape-context
items.title: Shape Context
items.description: React context provider for runtime shape variant switching (pill or rounded). Controls border-radius across all Fluid Functionalism components.

items.name: icon-context
items.title: Icon Context
items.description: React context provider for runtime icon library switching with Lucide fallback.

items.name: icon-map
items.title: Icon Map
items.description: Canonical icon name mapping across Lucide, Tabler, Phosphor, and HugeIcons.

items.name: use-proximity-hover
items.title: useProximityHover
items.description: React hook for proximity-based hover detection. Tracks the closest item to the mouse cursor within a container, enabling smooth animated background indicators.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Collapsible accordion with animated height transitions, spring-animated chevron, and proximity hover in grouped mode. Built on Radix UI Accordion.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Compact label with solid and dot variants, Tailwind color palette, and three sizes.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Animated button with variants (primary, secondary, tertiary, ghost), icon support, loading spinner, and fluid font-weight transitions on hover.

items.name: dropdown
items.title: Dropdown
items.description: Dropdown menu with proximity-based hover tracking, animated selection indicator, and animated focus ring. Includes MenuItem sub-component.

items.name: checkbox-group
items.title: Checkbox Group
items.description: Animated checkbox group with proximity hover, contiguous selection merging, and spring-animated check marks. Built on Radix UI Checkbox.

items.name: radio-group
items.title: Radio Group
items.description: Animated radio group with proximity hover, spring-animated selection dot, and optional Radix UI integration. Supports both controlled index and value-based APIs.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Animated modal dialog with spring-based scale and opacity transitions. Built on Radix UI Dialog with overlay, header, footer, title, and description sub-components.

items.name: input-copy
items.title: Input Copy
items.description: Read-only input with a copy-to-clipboard button and animated check feedback. Supports optional label and shape context.

items.name: input-group
items.title: Input Group
items.description: Grouped input fields with proximity-based highlighting, animated label transitions, optional icons, and error states.

items.name: tabs-subtle
items.title: Tabs Subtle
items.description: Horizontal tab navigation with proximity hover, animated pill selection indicator, and fluid font-weight transitions. Supports icons and keyboard navigation.

items.name: switch
items.title: Switch
items.description: Animated toggle switch with spring-based thumb animation and fluid font-weight label transitions. Built on Radix UI Switch.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Animated table with proximity-based row hover highlighting and fluid border transitions. Includes TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, and TableCell sub-components.

items.name: slider
items.title: Slider
items.description: Animated slider with spring-snapped thumb, step dots, range mode, and click-to-edit value display. Built on Radix UI Slider.

items.name: tabs
items.title: Tabs
items.description: Segmented control tabs with sliding active indicator, proximity hover, and spring animations. Built on Radix UI Tabs.

items.name: thinking-indicator
items.title: Thinking Indicator
items.description: Animated loading indicator with morphing SVG path (circle to infinity loop) and shimmer text rotation. Cycles through customizable status words.

items.name: select
items.title: Select
items.description: Animated select menu with proximity hover, bordered/borderless variants, optional leading icons, spring-animated popover, and animated checkmark indicator.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Floating tooltip with spring-based animations, configurable placement, and rich content support.

items.name: thinking-steps
items.title: Thinking Steps
items.description: Chain-of-thought reasoning display with collapsible steps, sequential animation, source badges, and image support.

items.name: color-picker
items.title: Color Picker
items.description: Color picker with HEX, RGB, HSL, and OKLCH formats, alpha channel, optional swatches, and a popover trigger. Built on the Slider component with native EyeDropper support.

items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: Animated traveling glow border for cards, buttons, and AI surfaces. Web port of the React Native original. Sizes (sm/md/line), 4 color variants (colorful/mono/ocean/sunset), dark/light themes, configurable duration, brightness, saturation, and hue range.

items.name: agent-chat
items.title: Agent Chat
items.description: Drop-in agent chat shell combining MessageList + InputBar. Designed for Vercel AI SDK useChat(). Bundles the complete agent-ui kit (utils, types, hooks, theme, tool renderers).

items.name: agent-message-list
items.title: Agent Message List
items.description: Streaming message list for Vercel AI SDK UIMessage[]. Renders user + assistant messages, tool calls, copy actions.

items.name: agent-input-bar
items.title: Agent Input Bar
items.description: Composable input bar with suggestions, attachments, model picker, mode selector, and send/stop toggle.

items.name: agent-user-message
items.title: Agent User Message
items.description: User-side chat bubble component with custom theme tokens and contrast-aware text color.

items.name: agent-error-message
items.title: Agent Error Message
items.description: Error state component for failed tool calls or model responses.

items.name: agent-markdown
items.title: Agent Markdown
items.description: Streaming-optimized markdown via Streamdown with Shiki syntax highlighting and safe HTML.

items.name: agent-text-shimmer
items.title: Agent Text Shimmer
items.description: Animated text shimmer/skeleton for streaming-token placeholders.

items.name: agent-spiral-loader
items.title: Agent Spiral Loader
items.description: Lottie-driven spiral spinner for agent-thinking states.

items.name: agent-bash-tool
items.title: Agent Bash Tool
items.description: Terminal-style tool renderer for bash command output with ANSI color support.

items.name: agent-edit-tool
items.title: Agent Edit Tool
items.description: File diff viewer with approval row, powered by @pierre/diffs.

items.name: agent-search-tool
items.title: Agent Search Tool
items.description: Web search results grid for agent search tool calls.

items.name: agent-todo-tool
items.title: Agent Todo Tool
items.description: Checklist component with animated state transitions for todo tools.

items.name: agent-plan-tool
items.title: Agent Plan Tool
items.description: Task/step breakdown UI for agent planning tools.

items.name: agent-subagent-tool
items.title: Agent Subagent Tool
items.description: Nested agent invocation card.

items.name: agent-mcp-tool
items.title: Agent MCP Tool
items.description: Model Context Protocol tool renderer.

items.name: agent-thinking-tool
items.title: Agent Thinking Tool
items.description: Collapsible reasoning panel for chain-of-thought tokens.

items.name: agent-generic-tool
items.title: Agent Generic Tool
items.description: Fallback renderer for unknown tool types.

items.name: agent-tool-group
items.title: Agent Tool Group
items.description: Groups multiple tool calls into a single collapsible card.

items.name: agent-question-tool
items.title: Agent Question Tool
items.description: Clarifying questions UI supporting single, multi, and free-text variants.

items.name: claude-input
items.title: Claude Input
items.description: Claude-style landing composer: rounded prompt surface, model menu with extended thinking, attachment trigger, voice control, and category chips. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: claude-email-tool
items.title: Claude Email Tool
items.description: Animated email draft tool card with subject, recipient chips, body preview, and approval actions. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: claude-recommend-apps-tool
items.title: Claude Recommend Apps Tool
items.description: Recommendation grid for Claude apps with categorized presets. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: claude-recipe-tool
items.title: Claude Recipe Tool
items.description: Recipe card tool with unit conversion (us/metric), ingredient list, and step-by-step instructions. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: claude-map-itinerary-tool
items.title: Claude Map Itinerary Tool
items.description: Multi-day itinerary tool with Leaflet map, stop markers, and travel modes. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks. (Source filename retains the upstream 'itenerary' typo: claude-map-itenerary-tool.tsx)

items.name: cursor-questions-panel
items.title: Cursor Questions Panel
items.description: Cursor-style clarifying questions dialog with progress, multi-step Q&A, and free-text option. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: openai-chat-image
items.title: OpenAI Chat Image
items.description: OpenAI-style chat image preview with attachments and idea suggestions. From aisdkagents.com pro blocks.

items.name: theme-card-radio
items.title: Theme Card Radio
items.description: Visual theme selector (System / Light / Dark) with image-card previews and native radio inputs styled via peer selectors. Adapted from coss.com p-radio-group-6.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Radix-based popover themed with nexUI surface and shadow tokens. Includes a PopoverPopup alias for coss-compatible usage.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: react-day-picker v10 wrapped with nexUI tokens. Supports classNames + components overrides for custom DayButton patterns.

items.name: calendar-pricing
items.title: Calendar (Pricing)
items.description: Two-month pricing calendar with custom day buttons showing prices below the date. Good-price highlighting via emerald-500. Adapted from coss.com p-calendar-24.

items.name: calendar-with-date-input
items.title: Calendar (With Date Input)
items.description: Calendar synced with a linked ISO yyyy-MM-dd text input. Adapted from coss.com p-calendar-17.

items.name: calendar-with-time
items.title: Calendar (With Time)
items.description: Calendar paired with a time input. Adapted from coss.com p-calendar-18.

items.name: date-picker-presets
items.title: Date Picker (With Presets)
items.description: Popover date picker with Today / Tomorrow / In 3 days / In a week quick presets next to the calendar. Adapted from coss.com p-date-picker-4.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: Radix-based avatar with image + fallback. Themed via --muted / --muted-foreground tokens.

items.name: avatar-generators
items.title: Avatar Generators
items.description: Three deterministic SVG avatar backends: DiceBear (7 styles), MetaMask Jazzicon (crypto address patterns), and spell.sh-style HSL fallback. All seed-based.

items.name: avatar-group
items.title: Avatar Group
items.description: Overlapping avatar stack with ring separator and +N overflow pill. Adapted from coss.com p-avatar-13.

items.name: avatar-button
items.title: Avatar Button
items.description: Pill button with leading avatar. Adapted from coss.com p-button-28.

items.name: avatar-select
items.title: Avatar Select
items.description: Single-select dropdown showing avatar+name rows. Adapted from coss.com p-select-19.

items.name: member-filter
items.title: Member Filter
items.description: Segmented filter pill with searchable multi-select member combobox in a popover. Adapted from coss.com p-group-23.

items.name: p-card-11
items.title: PCard11 — Empty State
items.description: Empty-state card with folder icon, title, description, and primary action. From coss.com.

items.name: p-table-2
items.title: PTable2
items.description: Compact data table with row hover, status badges, and frame wrapper. From coss.com.

items.name: p-table-3
items.title: PTable3
items.description: Selectable table with checkboxes, sorting, pagination, and frame wrapper. From coss.com.

items.name: p-table-4
items.title: PTable4
items.description: Table variant with extended column controls. From coss.com.

items.name: p-table-6
items.title: PTable6
items.description: Table with grouped headers and filter affordances. From coss.com.

items.name: p-table-8
items.title: PTable8
items.description: Advanced table with multi-state row actions. From coss.com.

items.name: p-input-11
items.title: PInput11
items.description: Input with keyboard shortcut hint (Kbd) suffix. From coss.com.

items.name: p-input-group-20
items.title: PInputGroup20
items.description: Input group with search icon prefix. From coss.com.

items.name: p-input-group-23
items.title: PInputGroup23
items.description: Search input group with loader and microphone affordance. From coss.com.

items.name: p-autocomplete-12
items.title: PAutocomplete12
items.description: Async-loading autocomplete combobox with Spinner. From coss.com.

items.name: p-sheet-2
items.title: PSheet2
items.description: Form-driven side sheet (Field + Form + Input) with submit and cancel. From coss.com.

items.name: p-command-1
items.title: PCommand1
items.description: Command palette with grouped suggestions/commands and keyboard shortcut hints. From coss.com.

items.name: p-command-2
items.title: PCommand2
items.description: Command palette with autocomplete filter, empty-state, and external commandHandle for programmatic control. From coss.com.

items.name: p-frame-1
items.title: PFrame1
items.description: Basic Frame primitive with rounded surface and shadow. From coss.com.

items.name: p-frame-2
items.title: PFrame2
items.description: Frame with header (FrameHeader) and content panel (FramePanel). From coss.com.

items.name: p-frame-3
items.title: PFrame3
items.description: Frame with split panels. From coss.com.

items.name: p-frame-4
items.title: PFrame4
items.description: Frame with separator and stacked sections. From coss.com.

items.name: linear-shell
items.title: Linear Shell
items.description: Application shell layout inspired by Linear.app — 244px scrollable sidebar with grouped sections, 32px top action bar, framed content card, floating help button. Compound API. Built entirely on nexUI semantic tokens (bg-background, bg-card, bg-accent, text-muted-foreground, border-border) for automatic light + dark adaptation.

items.name: linear-agent-shell
items.title: Linear Agent Shell
items.description: Example block composing LinearShell + GlassAvatar + ThinkingSteps + ThinkingIndicator + Markdown + ClaudeInput. A complete user↔agent conversation surface (turn-taking, completed chain-of-thought, live thinking indicator, Claude-style composer) ready to drop into a Next.js page or layout. Theme-adaptive via nexUI tokens.
